ddls:
CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "province_code" TEXT /* Code for the province */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the province */,
  "land_area" INTEGER /* Total land area of the province in square kilometers */,
  "gdp" TEXT /* Gross Domestic Product of the province */,
  "agricultural_contribution" TEXT /* Percentage of GDP contributed by agriculture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agricultural_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agricultural region */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* ID of the province the region belongs to */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the agricultural region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code for the agricultural region */,
  "total_area" INTEGER /* Total area of the agricultural region in square kilometers */,
  "arable_land" INTEGER /* Area of arable land in the region */,
  "irrigated_land" INTEGER /* Area of irrigated land in the region */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil predominant in the region */,
  "climate_type" TEXT /* Type of climate in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agricultural_regions_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census division */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* ID of the province the division belongs to */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the census division */,
  "division_code" TEXT /* Code for the census division */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the census division */,
  "land_area" INTEGER /* Total land area of the census division in square kilometers */,
  "rural_population" INTEGER /* Number of people living in rural areas */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Number of people living in urban areas */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_divisions_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_subdivisions" (
  "subdivision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census subdivision */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the census division the subdivision belongs to */,
  "subdivision_name" TEXT /* Name of the census subdivision */,
  "subdivision_code" TEXT /* Code for the census subdivision */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the census subdivision */,
  "land_area" INTEGER /* Total land area of the census subdivision in square kilometers */,
  "rural_population" INTEGER /* Number of people living in rural areas */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Number of people living in urban areas */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subdivision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_census_subdivisions_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES census_divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "farm_data" (
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farm */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agricultural region the farm belongs to */,
  "farm_name" TEXT /* Name of the farm */,
  "total_farms" INTEGER /* Total number of farms in the region */,
  "farms_with_computers" INTEGER /* Number of farms using computers */,
  "farms_with_internet" INTEGER /* Number of farms using internet */,
  "total_land_area" INTEGER /* Total land area of the farm in hectares */,
  "irrigated_land_area" INTEGER /* Area of irrigated land in the farm */,
  "crop_yield" TEXT /* Average crop yield in the farm */,
  "livestock_count" INTEGER /* Total number of livestock */,
  "farm_type" TEXT /* Type of farm (e.g., organic, conventional) */,
  "farming_practices" TEXT /* Description of farming practices used */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_farm_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES agricultural_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "computer_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each computer usage record */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the farm the usage record belongs to */,
  "bookkeeping" INTEGER /* Number of farms using computers for bookkeeping */,
  "livestock_record_keeping" INTEGER /* Number of farms using computers for livestock record keeping */,
  "crop_record_keeping" INTEGER /* Number of farms using computers for crop record keeping */,
  "word_processing" INTEGER /* Number of farms using computers for word processing */,
  "desktop_publishing" INTEGER /* Number of farms using computers for desktop publishing */,
  "banking" INTEGER /* Number of farms using computers for banking */,
  "email" INTEGER /* Number of farms using computers for email */,
  "internet_speed" TEXT /* Average internet speed in Mbps */,
  "software_used" TEXT /* List of software used in farming practices */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_computer_usage_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES farm_data ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object detailing user permissions */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
